title: Backported Textures
description: This resource pack backports all textures from 1.21 to 1.8.9 so that 1.8.9 looks much better.
body:
[![Swills](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModderZellior/Image/main/bannerofswills.jpg)](https://swills.gg/?ref=ZELLIOR)

Backported Textures backports all textures(except water) from 1.21 to 1.8.9 making 1.8.9 more appealing to the eye and more enjoyable to play. Nothing is changed except the textures, which means everything looks normal. No shorter swords or anything like that. I made this texture pack with hypixel in mind, as I play a lot of hypixel.

This texture pack should be compatible with most texture packs.![1.21 textures in 1.8.9 minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e72319b967375af879d645076e4e42bd209110a1.png)

Join my discord for feedback, suggestions and bug reports!
